---
title: "UIAO Customer Documents"
doc-type: landing
audience: "Authorizing officials · assessors · customers · technical leads"
derived-from: "uiao-core canon (UIAO Canonical Document Specification v1.3)"
generated-by: "Quarto render pipeline (see uiao-docs/_quarto.yml)"
---

# UIAO Customer Documents {.unnumbered}

This is the external-facing documentation layer for the **UIAO Modernization Atlas**. Every document in this tree is either (a) derived from canonical artifacts in [`uiao-core`](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao-core) or (b) an authored extension that explicitly cites its canon source.

::: {.callout-note}
## Provenance & No-Hallucination Protocol

All documents in this tree carry YAML frontmatter that traces provenance back to a specific canon source. Content labeled **NEW (Proposed)** indicates material that has been authored for leadership review and is not yet promoted to canonical. Content labeled **MISSING** or **UNSURE** indicates gaps against the source text that require clarification before canonicalization.
:::

## Document families

### Adapter artifacts — canon-derived

These two document trees mirror the adapter registries in `uiao-core/canon/`. Each adapter in canon gets one document in each tree; the frontmatter is regenerated from canon on every sync.

| Tree | Purpose | Canon source |
|---|---|---|
| [Adapter Technical Specifications](adapter-technical-specifications/index.qmd) | Per-adapter operational design, runtime profile, scope, NIST control mapping | `uiao-core/canon/{adapter,modernization}-registry.yaml` |
| [Adapter Validation Suites](adapter-validation-suites/index.qmd) | Per-adapter validation tests, evidence expectations, drift-detection procedures | `uiao-core/canon/{adapter,modernization}-registry.yaml` |

### Modernization domain artifacts — authored

These trees hold higher-level, cross-adapter technical material organized by technology domain rather than by per-system adapter.

- **Modernization Technical Specifications** — cross-adapter specs for identity modernization, SD-WAN, SASE, Zero-Trust substrate.
- **Modernization Validation Suites** — cross-cutting validation approach for modernization programs.

### Executive & narrative artifacts

- **Executive Briefs** — Single-page summaries for agency leadership.
- **Executive Governance Series** — Longer-form governance narratives for CIO / CISO audiences.
- **Architecture Series** — Published architecture articles under the pseudonymous byline per docs governance.
- **Case Studies** — Real-world deployment patterns and lessons learned.
- **Whitepapers** — Externally releasable deep-dives.

## Canon invariants

Every document in this tree respects the following invariants inherited from `uiao-core`:

- **Boundary:** `gcc-moderate` unless explicitly noted.
- **Commercial cloud exception:** Amazon Connect Contact Center only.
- **Identity model:** Object identity only. No person identity.
- **SSOT discipline:** Adapters consume and emit; they never mutate SSOT.
- **Certificate anchoring:** Every transaction is certificate-anchored.

## Governance

Drift between this tree and `uiao-core` canon is detected by `uiao-core/tools/sync_canon.py` and surfaced as `canon-sync`-labeled PRs. See `uiao-core/ARCHITECTURE.md` §4 for the cross-repo sync contract and `uiao-core/tools/README.md` for operational detail.

---

*Generated under the UIAO Canonical Document Specification v1.3. Authored under pseudonym Michal Doroszewski per `uiao-docs/CLAUDE.md` §Operating Principles.*
